subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from Him Who is imprisoned to the one upon whom His glances were directed ere any among all created things had known Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المسجون الی الذی توجهت الیه لحظاته قبل ان یعرفه احد من الممکنات
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @power of prayer, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
